Off Calendar May-27-2009 Continued To Jun-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phylis Berenson for Lita Tabish (Executor).

Ms. Berenson stated that the sale was in escrow which is to close next week, but that the Buyer had not signed off on the finance contingency. The matter was continued to June 24, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
